concept: Could you create a turn-based game where I'm a dream architect constructing surreal landscapes from fragments of a sleeping person's memories? I place emotional triggers, symbolic objects, and recurring themes to guide the dreamer toward resolving their subconscious conflicts. Dream guardians attempt to wake the person if they sense my presence, forcing me to work subtly and indirectly. Each successful dream therapy session unlocks more powerful architectural elements and reveals deeper layers of the dreamer's psyche.
